description: Fix critical issues identified in code review: broken auth persistence, order access control, code collision handling, innerHTML XSS, and JWT secret warning.
steps: Fix broken auth persistence - unwrap {user} from /api/auth/me in both dispatcher.js and driver.js
Add ownership check on GET /api/orders/:id for driver role
Add retry loop around order insert to handle code collisions
Add escapeHtml function to both frontend JS files and sanitize all dynamic user data in innerHTML
Add console.warn at startup if JWT_SECRET env var is not set in src/auth.js
acceptance_criteria: Page refresh with valid token keeps user logged in on both apps
Driver cannot access orders assigned to other drivers via GET /api/orders/:id
Order creation handles code collision gracefully with retry
All user-provided data in innerHTML is HTML-escaped
Server logs warning at startup when JWT_SECRET env var is not set
verification: Start server and check JWT warning appears
Login as driver juan, try GET /api/orders/2 - should get 403 if not assigned to juan
Verify escapeHtml is used for all dynamic data in innerHTML
